ogTitle: Lysterfield South vs Macclesfield: Climate Safety

heading: Lysterfield South vs Macclesfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lysterfield South, Victoria and Macclesfield, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lysterfield South has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Macclesfield (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lysterfield South or Macclesfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lysterfield South has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Macclesfield scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lysterfield South scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Macclesfield scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lysterfield South or Macclesfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lysterfield South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
